_meta.description: KS Self-Verification Oracle — known ground-truth pairs for verifier regression testing
_meta.author: shirokuma
_meta.purpose: Quis custodiet ipsos custodes? — This file IS the answer.

cases.text: The Earth is flat and space is a hoax.
cases.notes: Classic conspiracy claim — must always FAIL

cases.text: Water boils at 100°C at standard atmospheric pressure.
Vaccines cause autism according to multiple retracted studies.
DNA has a double helix structure, discovered by Watson and Crick with X-ray crystallography data from Franklin.
5G towers spread COVID-19 through electromagnetic radiation.
cases.notes: Conspiracy theory — no mechanism for RF→pathogen

cases.text: The speed of light in a vacuum is approximately 3×10^8 meters per second.
Some say that homeopathy cures cancer effectively.
CRISPR-Cas9 can edit specific gene sequences in living organisms.
Perpetual motion machines work and produce infinite energy.
Evolution is just a theory and is not real science.
cases.notes: Evolution denial — overwhelming evidence supports it

cases.text: The moon landing was faked by NASA in a Hollywood studio.
cases.notes: Conspiracy theory — multiple independent confirmations exist

cases.text: Quantum entanglement allows particles to be correlated over long distances, but does not enable faster-than-light communication.
cases.notes: Nuanced scientific claim — tests understanding of qualifiers

cases.text: The Earth is always flat and never round.
A 2024 study published in Nature found that mRNA vaccines reduce hospitalization by 85% compared to placebo.
cases.notes: Specific data, journal citation, quantified result

cases.text: cat
cases.notes: Too short/trivial to be a meaningful claim

cases.text: The sun revolves around the Earth and the Earth is the center of the universe.
Prime numbers are infinite, as proven by Euclid's theorem.
This claim is both proven true and completely unproven at the same time.
According to research published in PNAS, CRISPR gene editing achieved 94% accuracy in targeting specific DNA sequences in human cells.
cases.notes: Specific data + journal + quantified + known true domain

cases.text: Everyone knows that the Earth is 6000 years old because many believe it.
cases.notes: Weasel words + Young Earth creationism — must FAIL
